title: Chandaka Elephant Sanctuary
tagline: Chandaka Elephant Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Odisha

overview.short: Chandaka Elephant Sanctuary is a wildlife reserve in the southern fringe of Cuttack district in the Indian state of Odisha.
overview.description: Chandaka Elephant Sanctuary is a wildlife reserve in the southern fringe of Cuttack district in the Indian state of Odisha. Nestled on Khurdha uplands of the Eastern Ghats biotic region, Chandaka forest is spread over 175.79 km2 (67.87 sq mi) of rolling table land and small sprawling hillocks of Khurdha and Cuttack districts. It was designated as an elephant reserve in December 1982.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Bhubaneswar Metro
topPlaces.description: The Bhubaneswar Metro is a proposed rapid transit system for the twin cities of Bhubaneswar and Cuttack in Odisha, India. In the first phase, a 30 km (19 mi) metro trunk route will be created from SCB Medical College in Cuttack to the Biju Patnaik International Airport in Bhubaneswar.

topPlaces.name: Central Tool Room and Training Centre, Bhubaneswar
topPlaces.description: Central Tool Room and Training Centre, located in Bhubaneswar, is an autonomous body under the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, Government of India. In addition to imparting technical training for the skill development of technical staff as well as students in the engineering and technical fields, the institute strives to foster the progress of micro, small and medium enterprises in the country and to facilitate the development of the youth.

image.alt: Central Tool Room and Training Centre, Bhubaneswar

topPlaces.name: Nandankanan Zoological Park
topPlaces.description: Nandankanan Zoological Park is a 437-hectare (1,080-acre) zoo and botanical garden located in Barang village, Odisha, India. It is 10 km to south of Cuttack and 10 km north of Bhubaneswar.

topPlaces.name: Chandrasekharpur
topPlaces.description: Chandrasekharpur is a commercial area in Odisha's capital city, Bhubaneswar.

topPlaces.name: Kanjia Lake
topPlaces.description: Kanjia Lake (Odia: କାଞ୍ଜିଆ ହ୍ରଦ) is a natural lake on the northern outskirts of Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India. While the main lake covers 75 hectares (190 acres), the total wetland covers 105 hectares (260 acres), with a scuba diving facility.

topPlaces.name: Chudanga Gada
topPlaces.description: Chudanga Gada, formerly known as Sarangagarh, is a fort in Odisha state of India. The fort is situated at a latitude of 20°25’16" north and longitude of 85°48’25" east and at an elevation of 100 feet above sea level.

topPlaces.name: Malipada
topPlaces.description: Malipada, is a Town in the Chandaka police station precinct of Khordha district in the Indian state of Odisha. It is situated on the outskirts of the state capital, Bhubaneswar, and falls under the administrative jurisdiction of the Bhubaneswar Block.

topPlaces.name: Chandrasekhara Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Chandrasekhara Mahadeva Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva located in the village Patia, Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India. The enshrined deity is a Shiva lingam within a circular yoni pitha.

items.note: The Bhubaneswar Metro is a proposed rapid transit system for the twin cities of Bhubaneswar and Cuttack in Odisha, India. In the first phase, a 30 km (19 mi) metro trunk route will be created from SCB Medical College in Cuttack to the Biju Patnaik International Airport in Bhubaneswar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chandaka Elephant Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chandaka Elephant Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chandaka Elephant Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (15 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (13 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chandaka Elephant Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chandaka Elephant Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chandaka Elephant Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Chandaka Elephant Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chandaka Elephant Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhubaneswar Metro, Central Tool Room and Training Centre, Bhubaneswar, Nandankanan Zoological Park, Chandrasekharpur, Kanjia Lake.
